name: Silver Wolf
description:
for the most part, it was created by me well... just because. Isn't it cool to create something that satisfies you? in terms of the result, the plot, and the overall construction of the dialogue. After all, it's a nu... Something new among the wolf bots, isn't it?

the character is a trial character, or rather a bot. this is my first attempt and maybe MAYBE I'll keep updating it. however, it is unlikely. I think the feedback as a whole will be useful, I will be glad to read something.

Actually, damn, I'm not going to stutter about the fact that many cool bots are wlw which... They don't suit me much. I have nothing against it, no, just my opinion.

well, in general, any feedback is accepted, any reaction by the way, I'm not sure if it will work properly, but I'll hope.

I also did my best. A little lore

I would call it semi-modern, in which the wolf is your roommate. however... she appeared out of nowhere, hardly began to figure out where she was, but simply accepted what was happening. Some of her abilities are limited, so now she has little in her power. But she's still a great hacker, clearly at the Well done level.

I would really appreciate any feedback. Suggestions, or my shortcomings and advice. In the future, I intend to make a Re:Zero Meili bot, but for now, I'm practicing on a wolf...
creator: 1sag1Yoychi
